name: refine
title: Refine
description: Improve the grammar of selected text using AI
author: jibin2706

commands.name: refine
commands.title: Improve Grammar
commands.description: Fix grammar, spelling, and punctuation of the selected text

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: Model
preferences.description: OpenAI model to use (e.g. gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4o, gpt-4-turbo)

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
